    "Calibration sheet indicates systematic zero vs. span error",
    "Instrument output deviates beyond acceptable ISA tolerance limits"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the instrument from the process",
    "Perform a full five-point calibration check to isolate zero shift from span error",
    "Adjust zero and span screws or recalibrate via communicator, replacing the transmitter if repeatability cannot be achieved"
  ],
  "rationale": "The calibration sheet documentation (FD+DOC) reveals a clear zero or span error that exceeds the maximum permissible error defined by site QC and ISA standards. Because the asset is in-service with an out-of-tolerance instrument, it is marked as a fail until recalibration or replacement is completed.",
